rationale.R1.2: Identification assumptions (i–iii) are listed out of order relative to the results they underwrite, assumption (iii) consistency receives no discussion, and the overlap assumption is asserted rather than evidenced; logical completeness of the causal chain is materially incomplete.
rationale.R1.3: The point estimate (+4.7 pp), CI (3.9–5.5), Rosenbaum Γ (≥1.8), and HTE contrasts (≈0 vs. >8 pp) are all stated without linking to the analysis steps that produce them; alignment between claims and supporting evidence needs verification.

rationale.R1.6: Load-bearing: 'improve this draft' centrally implies prose-level improvements — sentence clarity, paragraph cohesion, transition quality, and precision of technical language throughout.
